name: solver5-supplementary-literature-targets-miller-valkov-abel-2026
notes: Targets are conservative literature-backed reachable week counts for supplementary report-only cells.
Primary source is Miller, Valkov, Abel 2026 Appendix B table rows (v<=150) plus Table B42 additional examples.

When no direct table row exists, narrowly-scoped theorem-backed fallbacks are used: exact p=2 / p=3 / p=4 families, prime-power diagonal affine-plane cases, RTD lower bounds from MOLS, and MOLR lower bounds from the paper's MOLS table.
Blank targets mean no curated paper-derived target was entered yet, usually because the paper tables stop at v<=150 and no comparably clean fallback was available for the p>g case.
basis_rows: trivial single-player groups; no literature target recorded
